noveltyJustification: Prior finding 006 was confirmed, with a new explicit must-add/wrap clarification for lib/search/entity-density.ts and refreshed current line evidence for save, scan, bulk-delete, and mutation hooks.
findingsSummary: Entity-density invalidation remains manually wired in memory-save and memory-bulk-delete.
Scan stale deletion and generic mutation hooks remain branch/operation-level rather than typed action-batch subscribers.
Must-add/modify set should explicitly include or wrap lib/search/entity-density.ts in addition to the existing phase 006 file table.
